nodes.name: 🌿 Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives POST from your app OR WhatsApp Cloud API. Body: { userId, message, channel }

nodes.name: 📡 Channel Router
nodes.notes: Routes by channel: whatsapp / web / sms

nodes.name: 🚨 Crisis Keyword Detector
nodes.notes: Checks message for crisis keywords BEFORE calling AI. Fast, no API cost.

nodes.name: Crisis gate
nodes.notes: True → Crisis Agent path. False → Normal triage path.

parts.text: You are MindBridge's crisis support agent. A user has expressed thoughts that may indicate a mental health crisis. Respond with extreme compassion, validate their feelings, and immediately provide the message: 'Please reach out to a crisis helpline right now. You are not alone.' Keep your response under 3 sentences. Never minimise their pain.

You are MindBridge's triage agent. A user has reached out for a mental health check-in. Read what they shared and respond warmly and personally in 2-3 sentences. Acknowledge exactly what they said. End by saying you will ask them 4 short questions. Never be clinical or generic.

nodes.name: 💬 Triage Agent (Gemini)
nodes.notes: Personalised warm welcome. Called first when user starts screening.

parts.text: You are MindBridge's clinical risk analysis agent. You receive PHQ-2 and GAD-2 scores plus the user's own words. Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure: { "riskLevel": "low"|"moderate"|"high", "riskTitle": "max 6 words", "riskIcon": "emoji", "personalMessage": "2-3 sentences referencing their specific answers", "keyInsight": "one sentence pattern observation" }. Be compassionate and specific. Never be generic.

=PHQ-2 score: {{ $json.body.phqScore }}/6
GAD-2 score: {{ $json.body.gadScore }}/6
Total: {{ $json.body.phqScore + $json.body.gadScore }}/12
User context: "{{ $json.body.userContext }}"

nodes.name: 🧠 Risk Agent (Gemini)
nodes.notes: Takes PHQ-2 + GAD-2 scores + user context → personalised risk analysis JSON

parts.text: You are MindBridge's care navigation agent. Based on screening results, generate exactly 3 personalised, actionable next steps as a JSON array of 3 strings. Reference the user's specific situation. Max 20 words each. For high risk: step 1 must be a crisis helpline. For moderate: include a GP visit. For low: focus on maintaining wellbeing.

=Risk level: {{ $json.body.riskLevel }}
PHQ-2: {{ $json.body.phqScore }}/6
GAD-2: {{ $json.body.gadScore }}/6
User context: "{{ $json.body.userContext }}"
Return JSON array of 3 strings.

nodes.name: 🗺️ CareNavigator Agent (Gemini)
nodes.notes: Generates 3 personalised next steps based on risk + context

nodes.name: 📦 Merge + Parse Results
nodes.notes: Parses JSON from Risk Agent + CareNavigator, bundles into clean response

nodes.name: 💾 Store to DB (anonymised)
nodes.notes: Writes anonymised risk level + timestamp to DB. Never stores message text.

nodes.name: ✅ Respond to App
nodes.notes: Returns full result JSON to your Lovable/React app

nodes.name: ⏰ 7-day Follow-Up Cron
nodes.notes: Fires every day, checks DB for patients due a 7-day follow-up

nodes.name: 📋 Fetch Patients Due
nodes.notes: Queries DB for patients due a check-in today

parts.text: You are MindBridge's follow-up agent. Write a warm, brief (2 sentences max) check-in message for someone who screened as {{ $json.lastRisk }} risk 7 days ago. Invite them to do a quick re-screening. Be gentle and human, never clinical.
Generate a 7-day follow-up message for a {{ $json.lastRisk }}-risk patient.

nodes.name: 📲 FollowUp Agent (Gemini)
nodes.notes: Generates personalised follow-up message per patient
